ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED( Customer__c)), OR( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'GoEasy_CCS_Account', Customer__r.RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'CCS_Accounts'),
AND(OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Credit_Card_Account',RecordType.DeveloperName ='Loan_Account'), Customer__r.RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Fidem_Customer'),
AND(OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Distressed_Account',RecordType.DeveloperName = 'CCS_Account'), Customer__r.RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Canaccede_Customer')
) )
